title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.150 - Public documents edited by authority of Congress
text:
490.150.  Public documents edited by authority of Congress. — Public documents, purporting to be edited or printed by authority of congress, or either house thereof, shall be evidence to the same extent that authenticated copies of the same would be.
(RSMo 1939 § 1818) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1654; 1919 § 5341; 1909 § 6286 
(1960) Book prepared by federal agency relating to the prospective development of area in which land was located held properly excluded in condemnation action to determine the value of property. State ex rel. State Highway Commission v. Dockery (Mo.), 340 S.W.2d 689.
